because.text: Seventh reviewer family, first to see the Lean fronts. The run exhausted its token budget (scratchpad, not a finished verdict) and half its findings were artifacts of an incomplete or_review brief: GATES fed only 1 of 4 proof bridges and PRIMARY_SOURCES omitted governance_vectors.json, so a code-less reviewer inferred 'missing' what ships and passes in CI. Durable fix accepted: or_review GATES now run governance replay+differential, a Rust build+conformance gate under cargo, and all four proof bridges under lean (visible SKIP otherwise) - third occurrence of 'stale briefs blind the reviewer'. Adjudicated non-defects: uint32 budget-wrap is precluded by the normative check-before-action rule (eval_spent_le proves spent<=atp); the GOV competing-adoption freeze is total by construction (an unauthorized set is not a valid ancestor -> no successor authorizes -> no divergence). Confirmed-false artifacts: Warrant snapshot IS pinned (73758bdb), governance vectors DO ship (17), row-correspondence IS closed by EvalMachine size_step. No spec change, no governed release needed - only tooling. A re-run on the corrected brief was offered to get a finished verdict.

subject.note: Kimi k2.6 v0.6.4 holistic review (7th family): no spec/consensus defect; one durable fix - complete the reviewer briefing
